name: Sopa De Elote (Corn Chowder)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 3-quart pan.
2. Add chili powder and cumin; cook for several minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Add peppers (if using) and corn kernels.
4. Pour in chicken broth and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for about 5 minutes.
6. Stir in milk and salt.
7. Serve hot.
